ORDER APPROVING PETITION FOR TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - PETITIONER SYMETRA ASSIGNED BENEFITS SERVICE COMPANY 'S AMENDED PETITION FOR COURT APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS GRANTED. THE AGREEMENT APPEARS TO BE IN ORDER BASED ON MR. DENT'S REPRESENTATATION, HIS DESIRE TO GO FORWARD WITH THIS AND THE FACT THAT THE NECESSARY DISCLOSURES HAVE BEEN MADE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
